scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test:bdd:validation: cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --tags "@REQ-RSV-400-required or @REQ-RSV-400-owner-name or @REQ-RSV-400-purpose-required or @REQ-RSV-400-purpose-length or @REQ-RSV-400-time-unit or @REQ-RSV-400-time-order or @REQ-RSV-400-duration-max or @REQ-RSV-400-business-hours" --require features/**/*.js --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:overlap: cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --tags "@REQ-RSV-409-overlap or @REQ-RSV-409-overlap-same-time or @REQ-RSV-201-overlap-boundary-end-start or @REQ-RSV-201-overlap-different-room" --require features/**/*.js --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:list: cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --tags "@REQ-RSV-301-list-by-date or @REQ-RSV-301-list-empty or @REQ-RSV-400-list-date-required or @REQ-RSV-400-list-date-format" --require features/**/*.js --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:cancel: cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --tags "@REQ-RSV-204-cancel or @REQ-RSV-404-cancel-not-found or @REQ-RSV-409-cancel-already-cancelled or @REQ-RSV-201-after-cancel-rebook" --require features/**/*.js --format progress
